creator: momchil@xaxo.eu
text:
ports config menu does not show up neither gives an error when TERM is not in /etc/termcap, though it should at least say something in order to indicate that there was an error or at least that there are some options to choose from, be it from the command line as arguments to make

How-To-Repeat: # setenv TERM rxvt-unicode-256color
_su: Cannot open /etc/termcap.
_su: using dumb terminal settings.
# 
# cd /usr/ports/lang/php5          
# make config                      
===> Options unchanged
#
